## RSNAV S5 PRO/ULTIMATE MCU UPDATE: Shutdown Issue Fix

\*This fix is only applicable to 1920x720 wide screen versions

We have identified and resolved an issue where the head unit occasionally fails to shut down. This situation primarily occurs when you lock the vehicle, open the door, and then close and lock the door again without turning on the ACC ignition.

To address this, we have released a new MCU update. Please check your current MCU version in the system settings (as shown in the reference images) and download the correct update file for your screen type:

- **For KS04 Screens (If your current MCU version starts with '99'):**

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JbsyuDtjJpOOKWPCnx470TSKk2zPM2\_T/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1JbsyuDtjJpOOKWPCnx470TSKk2zPM2_T/view?usp=drive_link)

Download here:

- **For Universal Screens (If your current MCU version starts with '46'):**

Download here:

[https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zP3vmCrju0roULWci9G0PylbPC\_4pgH8/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1zP3vmCrju0roULWci9G0PylbPC_4pgH8/view?usp=drive_link)

Please download the corresponding file and proceed with the MCU update to resolve the power-off issue.

See documentation section to learn how to update MCU files.

## Digital _MOST25/150_ Audio Gateway

VW · Audi · Mercedes-Benz · Porsche

A drop-in gateway that feeds Toslink or coaxial digital audio straight
into your car's factory MOST25/150 fibre-optic amplifier — no
analog stage, no signal loss. Installs in the OEM 6-disc CD changer or
AMI bay, delivering the cleanest sound your factory system is capable of producing.


[Back this project](https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/digitalaudiogateway/digital-most25-150-audio-gateway-for-vw-audi-benz-porsche)

**Ends Jul 4, 2026** Limited campaign

## Announcement

- RSNAV S5 PRO/ULTIMATE SOFTWARE UPDATE: See Release Notes
- Product descriptions are updated
- Documentation page is created and being updated.
- News page is separated

RSNAV is currently **shifting its business direction** from manufacturing Audi aftermarket infotainment (navigation) screens **to producing Audi aftermarket instrument clusters**.

As of May, 2026

- Android Motherboard in stock

\- B9,C7 10.25", 12.3": **less than 40**

**\-** B8 10,25", 12.3" : **less than 70**\- 9" for C7: **less than 10**

**All EU LTE only. US LTE version is now discontinued except few 9" for C7.**

\*Other models: please make an inquiry to **rsnav01@163.com** for availability

**After the remaining stocks get depleted, price increase of minimum 100$ USD expected due to memory shortage on AI Boom.** There is unprecedented spikes in memory prices—rising nearly 95% in early 2026 alone, and over 300% since 2025.

**S5 won't be discontinued for few more years**(except the 9" version which will be discontinued once the current motherboard stocks get depleted).

**Standard version is not affected by this shortage.**

# About this item

- ✅ Precise OEM Fit for Audi C7 MIB2 Models This 12.3-inch Android touch screen is perfectly customized for Audi A6, S6, RS6, A7, S7, RS7 C7 models with original MIB2 factory system. Adopts plug-and-play installation with dedicated harness, no wire cutting or modification, fully retaining original car functions and interior style.
- ✅ Dual Wireless CarPlay & Android Auto Built-in high-stability wireless CarPlay and wireless Android Auto modules. Support automatic reconnection after initial pairing without extra cables. It enables hands-free calling, voice control and wireless media sync, greatly improving driving convenience and safety during daily travel.
- ✅ Full Mirroring & Smart Split Screen Multitasking Supports full-screen phone mirroring and flexible split-screen display. You can run real-time GPS navigation and background music playback simultaneously on one screen. It realizes multi-task operation, meeting diverse driving needs and upgrading in-car entertainment experience.
- ✅ 128GB Large Storage & Smooth Wi-Fi System Equipped with upgraded 128GB large-capacity storage to store offline maps, music files and various application data freely. Built-in Wi-Fi module supports mobile hotspot connection for online network access, system updates and real-time map upgrades for smooth operation.
- ✅ Accurate GPS Navigation & Vehicle Camera Support Features high-precision GPS navigation with offline cache and real-time traffic reminders for accurate route guidance. Reserved dedicated camera ports are compatible with original backup cameras and aftermarket panoramic cameras, effectively enhancing parking and low-speed driving safety.

## Product Description

12.3" Android Touchscreen Upgrade for Audi A6/S6/RS6 C7 & A7/S7/RS7 C7 (2016-2018 MIB)

🚀 Key Features & Benefits:

🚗 Perfect Fit for Audi C7 (2016-2018 MIB): Engineered for a precise -like fit for Audi A6, S6, RS6, A7, S7, and RS7 C7 models equipped with the MIB infotainment system from 2016 to 2018.

📱 Seamless Wireless CarPlay & Android Auto: Enjoy your favorite Phone and Android apps on the big screen – wirelessly! Stream music, make calls, send messages, get directions, and more, all with intuitive voice control.

📍 Advanced Navigation System: Navigate with confidence using built-in GPS. Download your preferred navigation apps directly onto the unit for real-time traffic and turn-by-turn directions.

🪞 Screen Mirroring: Easily mirror your smartphone's screen onto the 12.3-inch display. Perfect for sharing photos, videos, or using apps not natively supported.

⚖️ Versatile Split Screen Functionality: Display two apps simultaneously, such as navigation on one side and music control on the other, for ultimate convenience.

🎵 Integrated Entertainment Hub: Stream your favorite content directly. Enjoy music from Spotify, YouTube, TikTok, and more, all accessible through the intuitive Android interface.

📸 Support for Vehicle Cameras: Enhance your awareness with seamless integration of rear cameras. Please note: rear camera IS NOT included in this package.

📶 Built-in Wi-Fi Connectivity: Connect to your home Wi-Fi or mobile hotspot for app downloads, software updates, and uninterrupted streaming.

✨ Clear 12.3" HD Display: Experience vibrant colors and sharp details on a large, responsive touchscreen that complements your Audi's interior.

⚙️ User-Friendly Android Interface: An intuitive and familiar Android operating system for easy navigation and customization.

✅ Hassle-Free 1-Year Warranty:

We stand behind the quality of our product. Enjoy peace of mind with a comprehensive 1-Year Warranty covering manufacturing defects.

💡 Easy Installation Notes:

This unit is designed for professional installation or experienced DIY enthusiasts.

💡 Compatibility Check:

IMPORTANT: Please verify your Audi's infotainment system is the MIB type and the model year falls within 2016-2018 before purchasing. If you are unsure, please send us a photo of your car's center console.
